authors: Darren Hawkins Christopher F. Karpowitz Steven Greene Jay Goodliffe Logan Graham Ashlyn Bodily a Department of Political Science
raw_title: The Poverty of Moral Foundation Messaging
title_en: The Poverty of Moral Foundation Messaging
title_zh: 道德基础信息传递的贫乏
plain_summary_zh: 这篇文章探讨了基于道德基础的信息传递策略在政治传播中的效果和局限性。
plain_summary_en: This article examines the effectiveness and limitations of moral foundation-based messaging strategies in political communication.
research_direction_zh: 研究政治传播中道德框架和信息策略的有效性，探索如何更好地与不同价值观的受众沟通。
research_direction_en: Investigating the effectiveness of moral framing and messaging strategies in political communication, exploring how to better communicate with audiences holding different values.
